text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of planning out a<n>training
regimen, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ouch, my head... It feels like it's about<n>to stretch
apart like New Year's<n>mochi...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I guess this means my<n>protective charms
aren't working<n>anymore.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have a charm dedicated to soothing<n>headache
pain, and one that helps<n>medicine work a hundred
times<n>better...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's why! I'm not wearing my
headache-removal cha—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's headache<n>seems to be
pretty bad.
